# disconnect(from:)

**Instance Method**

Disconnects the central manager from the specified, connected peripheral.

## Declaration

```swift
func disconnect(from peripheral: CBPeripheral)
```

## Parameters

- **peripheral**: The peripheral to disconnect from the central manager.
title: disconnect(from:)
